name: Instagram Following
description: Users this Instagram account follows, paginated through the friendships REST endpoint.

accounts.description: Legacy alias for the list of accounts the user follows; present for backward compatibility with the pre-API connector

is_private.description: True if the followed account is private

is_verified.description: True if the followed account has the verified badge

profile_pic_url.description: URL of the followed account's profile picture

total.description: Legacy total count of followed accounts

following.description: Full list of accounts this user follows, ordered as returned by Instagram's friendships endpoint

pk.description: Followed account's Instagram primary key (numeric user id, as string)

username.description: Followed account's Instagram handle without the leading @

full_name.description: Followed account's display name (may be empty string)

is_private.description: True if the followed account is private

is_verified.description: True if the followed account has the verified badge

profile_pic_url.description: URL of the followed account's profile picture

is_possible_scammer.description: True if Instagram has flagged the account as a possible scammer

has_anonymous_profile_picture.description: True if the followed account has not set a custom profile picture
